---
title: "Diandre' Mortality Script"
output: html_document
date: "2025-10-31"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
system("gh repo clone oystersdukebc/summer-2026-visualization-tool")
```


```{r}
#setwd("OceanModelIndexComparison")
#system("git pull origin main")  # or replace 'main' with the correct branch

```







```{r clear environment}
rm(list = ls())
```


```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

library(readxl)
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library("survminer")
theme_set(theme_classic())
library(summarytools)
library(readr)
library(GGally)
library(tidyverse)
library(lubridate)
library(writexl)
library(wesanderson)
library(tidyr)
library(hms)
library(paletteer)
library(zoo)
library(grid)
library(patchwork)

Mortality_All <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx")
Mortality_CMAST <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx", sheet = "CMAST")
Mortality_DUML <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx", sheet = "DAF")
Mortality_Ward <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx", sheet = "Ward Creek")
Mortality_Stump <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx", sheet = "Stump Sound")
Mortality_Nelson <- read_excel("C:\\Users\\drich\\OneDrive - Duke University\\Bass Mortality 2026.xlsx", sheet = "Nelson Bay")

```



```{r}

# Add a Site column to each.. dont need this because its already in excel
Mortality_CMAST <- Mortality_CMAST %>% mutate(Site = "CMAST")
Mortality_Ward <- Mortality_Ward %>% mutate(Site = "Ward Creek")
Mortality_DUML <- Mortality_DUML %>% mutate(Site = "DAF")

```


```{r}
clean_data <- function(df) {
  df %>%
    mutate(
      # Force Mortality Count to numeric. 
      # This automatically turns "MISSING" and blanks into NA.
      `Mortality Count` = suppressWarnings(as.numeric(as.character(`Mortality Count`)))
    ) %>%
    # Optional: Filter out rows where Date or Mortality Count is NA to keep the plot clean
    filter(!is.na(`Mortality Count`) & !is.na(Date))
}
```


```{r}
# 4. Clean the data
cmast_clean <- clean_data(Mortality_CMAST)
ward_clean  <- clean_data(Mortality_Ward )
daf_clean   <- clean_data(Mortality_DUML)
stump_clean <- clean_data(Mortality_Stump)
nelson_clean <- clean_data(Mortality_Nelson)
```




```{r}
plot_function <- function(dataframe, plot_title) {
  p <- dataframe %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, fill = "lightgray") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, color = "steelblue", alpha = 0.7) +
    geom_point(aes(color = GeneticStrand), size = 1) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "yellow",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = "Date", y = "Mortality Total", title = plot_title) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  return(p)
}



###Environmental Variables 


# Random Forest Package to see which environmental variable predict the best

## Survivor ship % for each site, remaining oysters/initial total oysters

```


```{r}
box_function <- function(dataframe, plot_title) {
  p <- dataframe %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`)) +
    geom_point(aes(color = GeneticStrand), size = 2) +
  scale_color_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "#F1C40F",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = "Date", y = "Mortality Total", title = plot_title) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  return(p)
}


###Possibly color code dots by Genetic Lines, might make another function for that

###Environmental Variables 


# Random Forest Package to see which environmental variable predict the best

## Survivor ship % for each site, remaining oysters/initial total oysters

```




```{r}
p1 <- plot_function(cmast_clean, "CMAST Mortality")

print(p1)
```

```{r}
cmast_genetics <- box_function(cmast_clean, "CMAST Genetic Strand Mortality")

print(cmast_genetics)
```







```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}


p2 <- plot_function(ward_clean, "Ward Creek Mortality")
print(p2)


```

```{r}
ward_genetics <- box_function(ward_clean, "Ward Genetic Strand Mortality")

print(ward_genetics)
```





```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
p3 <- plot_function(daf_clean, "DAF Mortality")
print(p3)

###Change Y Axis to 2 figures 2,4,6,etc

```


```{r}
daf_genetics <- box_function(daf_clean, "Duke Aqua Farm Strand Mortality")

print(daf_genetics)
```

```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}
daf_survival <- plot_function(daf_clean, "DAF Mortality")
print(daf_survival)

###Change Y Axis to 2 figures 2,4,6,etc

```


```{r}
bagplot_function <- function(dataframe, plot_title) {
  p <- dataframe %>%
    ggplot(aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`, color = GeneticStrand)) +
    geom_boxplot(outlier.shape = NA, fill = "lightgray") +
    geom_jitter(width = 0.2, alpha = 0.7) +
    theme_classic() +
    labs(x = "Date", y = "Mortality Total", color = "Bag", title = plot_title) +
    theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))
  
  return(p)
}


```

```{r}
stump_clean$Date <- as.Date(
  paste(stump_clean$Date, "15 2025"),
  format = "%b %d %Y"
)
```


##Stump Sound 

```{r}
p4 <- plot_function(stump_clean, "Stump Sound Mortality")

##Fix y axis so the months are in the same order

print(p4)
```






```{r}
stump_genetics <- box_function(stump_clean, "Stump Sound Strand Mortality")

print(stump_genetics)
```





```{r Stats Table Function All Together}

##Not split up by date

stats_function <- function(dataframe) {
  dataframe %>%
    group_by(GeneticStrand) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_mortality = mean(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_mortality   = sd(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_mortality  = min(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_mortality  = max(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}



```



```{r Stats Table Function by Date}


stats_datefunction <- function(dataframe) {
  dataframe %>%
    group_by(GeneticStrand, Date) %>%
    summarise(
      mean_mortality = mean(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      sd_mortality   = sd(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      min_mortality  = min(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      max_mortality  = max(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
      .groups = "drop"
    )
}



```


```{r}
CMAST_StatsDate <- stats_datefunction(cmast_clean)

CMAST_StatsDate
```
 


```{r CMAST Mortality by Genetic Strain message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

CMAST_Genetic <- ggplot(cmast_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`, fill = GeneticStrand)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "CMAST Mortality Total by Genetic Strain",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mortality"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "yellow",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(CMAST_Genetic)

###Stats table for genetic line

###July 9th, purple and yellow

```

```{r}
CMAST_Stats <- stats_function(cmast_clean)

CMAST_Stats
```


```{r}
CMAST_StatsDate <- stats_datefunction(cmast_clean)

CMAST_StatsDate
```



```{r message=FALSE, warning=FALSE, DUML Mortality by Genetic Strain message=FALSE}

DUML_Genetic <- ggplot(daf_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`, fill = GeneticStrand)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "DUML Mortality Total by Genetic Strain",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mortality"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "yellow",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(DUML_Genetic)

### Change Y axis to different numbers (Possibly by 2s?) 

### Make Y Axis scales for each site

###Maybe change visualization of dates to read better (add more spacing maybe) 

###Error bars

```


```{r Ward Mortality by Genetic Strain message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

Ward_Genetic <- ggplot(ward_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`, fill = GeneticStrand)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Ward Creek Mortality Total by Genetic Strain",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mortality"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "yellow",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(Ward_Genetic)

###Need to look at excel file for July dates

### Clean up x-axis for better readability 

```

### Amy data is for Stump Sound Site 

```{r}
stump_clean$Date <- factor(
  stump_clean$Date,
  levels = c("Apr", "May", "June", "July", "Aug", "Sep", "Oct"),
  ordered = TRUE
)


```



```{r Ward Mortality by Genetic Strain message=FALSE, warning=FALSE}

Stump_Genetic <- ggplot(stump_clean, aes(x = as.factor(Date), y = `Mortality Count`, fill = GeneticStrand)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "dodge") +
  labs(
    title = "Ward Creek Mortality Total by Genetic Strain",
    x = "Date",
    y = "Mortality"
  ) +
  scale_fill_manual(
    values = c(
      "New River (NR): Diploids from UNCW" = "purple",
      "Triploids: Triploids purchased from Downeast Mariculture" = "yellow",
      "Stump Sound (SS): Diploids from UNCW" = "orange",
      "Cedar Island (CI): Diploids from UNCW" = "blue"
    )
  ) +
  theme_minimal()

print(Stump_Genetic)

###Need to look at excel file for July dates

### Clean up x-axis for better readability 

```



```{r Stats Table by Genetic Line}


stats_table <- stump_clean %>%
  group_by(GeneticStrand) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality   = sd(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_mortality  = min(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_mortality  = max(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_table

```

```{r Stats Table by Genetic Line & Date}


stats_table <- stump_clean %>%
  group_by(GeneticStrand, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_mortality = mean(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_mortality   = sd(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    min_mortality  = min(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    max_mortality  = max(`Mortality Count`, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )

stats_table

```


### Survivorship Code 
```{r}


#Load survivorship data
SurvivorshipSheet <- ("C:\\Users\\drich\\Downloads\\Survivorship25Renamed.xlsx")
SurvivorshipSheetWC <- read_excel(SurvivorshipSheet, sheet = "WC")
SurvivorshipSheetCMT <- read_excel(SurvivorshipSheet, sheet = "CMAST")
SurvivorshipSheetDAF <- read_excel(SurvivorshipSheet, sheet = "DAF")

SurvivorshipWC <- as.data.frame(SurvivorshipSheetWC)
SurvivorshipCMT <- as.data.frame(SurvivorshipSheetCMT)
SurvivorshipDAF <- as.data.frame(SurvivorshipSheetDAF)

```

```{r}

#Setting site and combining dataframes:
SurvivorshipWC$Source <- "WC"
SurvivorshipCMT$Source <- "CMT"
SurvivorshipDAF$Source <- "DAF"

S_Combined <- bind_rows(SurvivorshipWC, SurvivorshipCMT, SurvivorshipDAF)

```



```{r}


Survivorship <- function(dframe) {
  
  splot <- ggplot(dframe, 
                  aes(x = Date, 
                      y = Survivorship, 
                      color = Site, 
                      group = Site)) + 
    
    geom_line(linewidth = 1) + 
    geom_point(size = 2) +
    
    coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 100)) +
    
    scale_color_manual(values = c(
      "CMAST" = "darkgreen",
      "DAF" = "red",
      "Ward Creek" = "blue",
      "Nelson Bay" = "purple",
      "StumpSound" = "orange"
    )) +
    
    theme_minimal() +
    
    labs(title = "Survivorship Curves by Site",
         y = "Percent Survival",
         x = "Date")
  
  return(splot)
}


```


```{r}

#Example usage
CMASTCurve <- Survivorship(Mortality_CMAST)

CMASTCurve

```



```{r}


DUMLCurve <- Survivorship(Mortality_DUML)

DUMLCurve

```


```{r}

#Example usage
STUMPCurve <- Survivorship(Mortality_Stump)

STUMPCurve

```


```{r}

#Example usage
WARDCurve <- Survivorship(Mortality_Ward)

WARDCurve

```


```{r}

#Example usage
NELSONCurve <- Survivorship(Mortality_Nelson)

NELSONCurve

```


### Morality Code all Together 

```{r}
Mortality_CMAST$Date  <- as.Date(Mortality_CMAST$Date)
Mortality_DUML$Date   <- as.Date(Mortality_DUML$Date)
Mortality_Ward$Date   <- as.Date(Mortality_Ward$Date)
Mortality_Nelson$Date <- as.Date(Mortality_Nelson$Date)
```

```{r}
Mortality_Stump$Date <- as.Date(
  paste(Mortality_Stump$Date, "15 2025"),
  format = "%b %d %Y"
)
```


```{r}
AllSites <- list(
  Mortality_CMAST,
  Mortality_DUML,
  Mortality_Stump,
  Mortality_Ward,
  Mortality_Nelson
) %>%
  lapply(function(df) {
    
    df <- df %>%
      mutate(
        Date = as.Date(Date),
        across(where(is.character), ~trimws(.)),
        `Mortality Count` = as.numeric(`Mortality Count`)
      )
    
    return(df)
  }) %>%
  bind_rows()
```
```{r}
AllSites <- AllSites %>%
  filter(!is.na(`Mortality Count`))
```


```{r}
AllSitesCurve <- Survivorship(AllSites)
AllSitesCurve
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

SurvivalSummary <- AllSites %>%
  group_by(Site, Date) %>%
  summarise(
    mean_surv = mean(Survivorship, na.rm = TRUE),
    sd_surv   = sd(Survivorship, na.rm = TRUE),
    .groups = "drop"
  )
```


```{r}
library(ggplot2)

PrettySurvival <- ggplot(SurvivalSummary,
                         aes(x = Date,
                             y = mean_surv,
                             color = Site,
                             group = Site)) +
  geom_point(data = AllSites,
           aes(x = Date,
               y = Survivorship,
               color = Site),
           alpha = 0.12,
           size = 3,
           inherit.aes = FALSE) +
  
  # Error bars (mean ± SD)
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = mean_surv - sd_surv,
                    ymax = mean_surv + sd_surv),
                width = 5,
                linewidth = 0.9,
                alpha = 0.6) +
  
  # Mean line
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.5) +
  
  # Mean points
  geom_point(size = 3) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(20, 100)) +
  
  scale_color_manual(values = c(
    "CMAST" = "#C84E00",
    "DAF" = "#0577B1",
    "Ward Creek" = "#009E73",
    "Nelson Bay" = "#8E44AD",
    "StumpSound" = "#E69F00"
  )) +
  
  labs(x = "Date",
       y = "% Survivorship per Bag",
       color = "Site") +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 16) +
  
  theme(
    axis.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.title = element_text(face = "bold"),
    legend.position = "right"
  )

PrettySurvival

###Oyster mortality across all four sites
```

```{r}
PrettySurvival +
  scale_x_date(date_breaks = "1 month",
               date_labels = "%b") +
theme_minimal() +
    
    labs(title = "Oyster Survivorship Across Time Over All Sites")


###Oyster mortality across all four sites 
```





```{r}
cmast_clean$FacetSite  <- "CMAST"
daf_clean$FacetSite   <- "DUML"
stump_clean$FacetSite  <- "Stump Sound"
ward_clean$FacetSite   <- "Ward Creek"
```




  



```{r}
AllSites <- bind_rows(
  cmast_clean,
  daf_clean,
  ward_clean,
  nelson_clean
)
```

```{r}
stump_clean$Date <- as.Date(
  paste(stump_clean$Date, "15 2025"),
  format = "%b %d %Y"
)
```



```{r}
AllSites$Date <- as.Date(AllSites$Date)
AllSites$Strain<- as.factor(AllSites$Strain)
AllSites$Site <- as.factor(AllSites$Site)
```

```{r}
library(dplyr)

# ---- 1. Fix Stump dates (month-only issue) ----
stump_clean$Date <- as.Date(
  paste(stump_clean$Date, "15 2025"),
  format = "%b %d %Y"
)

# ---- 2. Ensure other datasets have proper Date format ----
cmast_clean$Date  <- as.Date(cmast_clean$Date)
daf_clean$Date    <- as.Date(daf_clean$Date)
ward_clean$Date   <- as.Date(ward_clean$Date)
nelson_clean$Date <- as.Date(nelson_clean$Date)

# ---- 3. Bind ALL sites (including Stump) ----
AllSites <- bind_rows(
  cmast_clean,
  daf_clean,
  ward_clean,
  nelson_clean,
  Mortality_Stump
)

# ---- 4. Standardize column types AFTER binding ----
AllSites <- AllSites %>%
  mutate(
    Date   = as.Date(Date),
    Strain = as.factor(Strain),
    Site   = as.factor(Site)
  )
```



```{r}
ggplot(AllSites,
       aes(x = Date,
           y = `Mortality Count`,
           color = Site,
           group = Site)) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Strain) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 120)) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 120, by = 20)) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
```
```{r}
ggplot(AllSites,
       aes(x = Date,
           y = `Mortality Strain`,
           color = Site,
           group = Site)) +
  
  geom_line(linewidth = 1.2) +
  geom_point(size = 2) +
  
  facet_wrap(~ Strain) +
  
  coord_cartesian(ylim = c(0, 150)) +
  
  scale_y_continuous(breaks = seq(0, 150, by = 20)) +
  
  theme_classic(base_size = 15)
```
